channel.title: Elt on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Elt on Pi Stack

item.title: Meltano vs Airbyte vs Singer: Best Open-Source Data Pipeline 2026
item.description: Building reliable data pipelines from dozens of SaaS APIs, databases, and file sources into a central warehouse is one of the most expensive line items in a data team’s budget. Managed services like Fivetran and Stitch charge per row or per task, and those costs balloon quickly as your data volume grows.
